title: ceratophyllum demersum subvar. tricorne
intro: Ceratophyllum demersum subvar. tricorne, also known as hornwort, is a type of aquatic plant commonly found in freshwater environments, characterized by its distinctive horn-like branches and ability to thrive in low-light conditions. The plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of hornwort include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve respiratory health, and support the immune system. In herbal preparations, hornwort is often used as a tea or tincture, and can also be dried and used in infusions or capsules.
